description: Never autonomously execute mass-destructive irreversible write operations without explicit human approval. Covers DROP TABLE, rm -rf, bulk DELETE without WHERE, and analogous destructive patterns.

payload.invariant: Mass-destructive irreversible writes require human escalation regardless of trust score.

description: Never exfiltrate secrets, API keys, tokens, passwords or private keys to any external endpoint. Applies to all action types regardless of requester trust level.

payload.invariant: Credential and secret exfiltration is unconditionally blocked.

description: Autonomous deployment to production environments requires at minimum VERIFY with human confirmation. No agentic system may push directly to prod without a human checkpoint.

payload.invariant: Production deployments always require human review checkpoint.

description: AROMER must not modify, override, or disable REMORA's policy core (RemoraDecisionEngine, PolicyRule, DecisionEnvelope chain). AROMER may adjust trust/threshold/oracle selection only.

payload.invariant: AROMER adjusts governance parameters; it does not mutate the policy core.

description: Any AROMER world-model adaptation that would reduce a critical-tier trust score by more than 20% must run in shadow mode for at least 100 episodes before committing.

payload.invariant: Large trust adjustments in critical domains are shadow-tested before live deployment.
